intro.subtitle: AI Crop Defense Platform
intro.title: Smart Plant Disease Detection and Advisory
intro.leadOne: ShetVaidya helps you identify crop disease risk quickly using AI-powered diagnosis and treatment recommendations.
intro.leadTwo: Monitor disease trends, verify medicine authenticity, and access district-level advisories in one workflow.

features.aiDesc: Upload a leaf image and receive disease name, confidence score, causes, and treatment advice.
features.authDesc: OTP-protected authentication and profile controls keep farm records secure.
features.locationDesc: Use district-based recommendations for crop planning, irrigation strategy, and soil improvement.

users.farmersDesc: Get practical treatment suggestions and track crop health over time.
users.researchDesc: Access structured disease observations and confidence trends for analysis.
users.advisorsDesc: Deliver location-aware, data-supported crop guidance to farming communities.

intro.closingTitle: Move from reactive treatment to proactive crop health management
intro.videoHeadline: Disease Spreads Faster Than You Think.
intro.videoLeadOne: Early field signs are easy to miss during routine rounds. ShetVaidya helps you act before infection spreads across the plot.
intro.videoLeadTwo: Use AI crop checks, medicine verification, and district intelligence together to make faster, more confident farm decisions.

krushiVibhag.title: Krushi Vibhag
krushiVibhag.heroSubtext: Krushi Vibhag, Department of Agriculture Maharashtra, supports farmers with district-level supervision, crop advisory, and scheme access from field to office.
krushiVibhag.photoCaptionSoon: Photo and caption will be available soon
krushiVibhag.photosNotice: Farm photo list and captions will be available soon.
krushiVibhag.aboutLead: Krushi Vibhag is the government body that supervises agricultural development at district and taluka levels across Maharashtra.
krushiVibhag.aboutBody: It provides on-ground advisory, soil testing support, certified seed distribution, and scheme enrollment support. Farmers can visit their local office for free consultation.

districtOfficer.title: District Officer
districtOfficer.desc: Supervises district-level crop planning and seasonal agriculture priorities.

talukaSupervisor.title: Taluka Supervisor
talukaSupervisor.desc: Delivers field-level farmer advisory and implementation support.

villageWorker.title: Village Extension Worker
villageWorker.desc: Provides village-level, door-to-door crop guidance and issue reporting.

soilTesting.title: Free Soil Testing
soilTesting.desc: Get soil tested at government labs for pH, nutrient levels, and practical recommendations.

seedSubsidy.title: Seed and Fertilizer Subsidies
seedSubsidy.desc: Access subsidized certified seeds and fertilizers through approved schemes.

insurance.title: Crop Insurance Guidance
insurance.desc: Receive help enrolling in PM Fasal Bima Yojana and state insurance programs.

disaster.title: Disaster Relief Support
disaster.desc: Report flood, drought, or pest damage and get support to claim compensation.

pmfby.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
pmfby.description: Crop insurance protection against natural disasters and weather shocks.

pmKisan.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
pmKisan.description: Direct income support of Rs. 6,000 per year for eligible farmer families.

soilHealthCard.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
soilHealthCard.description: Free soil testing and nutrient health cards for field-based fertilizer planning.

pmksy.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana
pmksy.description: Irrigation subsidy support for drip and sprinkler systems.

mahadbt.name: Mahadbt Farmer Schemes
mahadbt.description: Maharashtra portal for equipment, input, and farm-mechanization subsidies.

namoShetkari.name: Namo Shetkari Maha Samman
namoShetkari.description: Maharashtra state additional support of Rs. 6,000 per year for eligible farmers.

hero.headline: Disease Spreads Faster Than You Think.
hero.subtext: Early field signs are easy to miss during routine rounds. ShetVaidya helps you act before infection spreads across the plot.
hero.supportingText: Use AI crop checks, medicine verification, and district intelligence together to make faster, more confident farm decisions.

early_blight.description: Early blight appears as dark concentric lesions and quickly weakens leaf health.
early_blight.cause: It is commonly triggered by fungal pressure in warm, humid field conditions.
early_blight.treatment: Remove infected foliage, improve airflow, and apply a recommended protective fungicide.

late_blight.description: Late blight causes water-soaked patches and can spread rapidly across plants.
late_blight.cause: Cool, moist weather and prolonged leaf wetness favor this fungal-like infection.
late_blight.treatment: Isolate affected plants and use targeted blight-control fungicides with interval spraying.

bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial spot creates dark angular lesions that reduce leaf function and vigor.
bacterial_spot.cause: It often spreads through splashing water, contaminated tools, and infected seedlings.
bacterial_spot.treatment: Avoid overhead irrigation, maintain sanitation, and use copper-based bactericide support.

leaf_mold.description: Leaf mold forms yellow patches on top of leaves and fungal growth on the underside.
leaf_mold.cause: High humidity and poor ventilation in dense canopies increase disease pressure.
leaf_mold.treatment: Improve ventilation, prune crowded leaves, and apply suitable fungicide protection.

septoria_leaf_spot.description: Septoria causes multiple small circular lesions that lead to early defoliation.
septoria_leaf_spot.cause: Persistent moisture and infected residue in soil help spores spread quickly.
septoria_leaf_spot.treatment: Remove infected leaves, rotate crops, and apply labeled fungicides at proper intervals.

spider_mites.description: Spider mite damage shows stippling, bronzing, and webbing on affected leaves.
spider_mites.cause: Hot, dry conditions and plant stress support rapid mite population growth.
spider_mites.treatment: Wash leaf undersides, use recommended miticides, and maintain balanced field moisture.

target_spot.description: Target spot creates concentric lesions that expand and reduce photosynthetic area.
target_spot.cause: Disease pressure increases with humid weather and dense plant spacing.
target_spot.treatment: Improve spacing and airflow, remove infected foliage, and spray preventive fungicides.

yellow_leaf_curl_virus.description: Leaf curl virus stunts growth and causes upward curling with yellowing foliage.
yellow_leaf_curl_virus.cause: The virus is mainly transmitted by whiteflies feeding across infected plants.
yellow_leaf_curl_virus.treatment: Control whiteflies early, remove infected plants, and use tolerant seed varieties.

mosaic_virus.description: Mosaic virus produces mottled, distorted leaves and overall yield decline.
mosaic_virus.cause: It can spread through sap contact, tools, and infected planting material.
mosaic_virus.treatment: Use clean tools, rogue infected plants, and follow strict field hygiene practices.

healthy.description: The leaf appears healthy with no visible disease lesions in this scan.
healthy.cause: Plant condition is currently stable under observed visual markers.
healthy.treatment: Continue preventive care, balanced nutrition, and routine scouting.

garbage_not_leaf.description: The uploaded image is not a clear plant leaf sample.
garbage_not_leaf.cause: The model could not detect valid crop leaf patterns in the image.
garbage_not_leaf.treatment: Retake the photo in daylight with one focused leaf filling most of the frame.
